# Generated by scripts/generate_api.py. Do not edit directly.
"""Generated asynchronous public facade."""

from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import timedelta
from pathlib import Path

from appwright.assertions.async_assertions import AsyncLocatorAssertions
from appwright.core.runtime import (
    AsyncAndroid,
    AsyncApp,
    AsyncAppwright,
    AsyncAppwrightContextManager,
    AsyncDevice,
    AsyncKeyboard,
    AsyncLocator,
    AsyncScreen,
    AsyncTouchscreen,
)
from appwright.core.runtime import (
    async_appwright as core_async_appwright,
)
from appwright.models.config import (
    AdditionalCapability,
    AndroidConnectionOptions,
    AppiumServer,
    AppiumTimeouts,
    ApplicationOptions,
)
from appwright.models.data import (
    DeviceInfo,
    ElementSnapshot,
    HierarchySource,
    OperationResult,
    Point,
    Rect,
    Screenshot,
    ServerLogRecord,
)
from appwright.models.enums import Direction, Key, Role, WaitState
from appwright.selectors.models import Selector
from appwright.tracing import TraceRecorder

TextValue = str


class Locator:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncLocator) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    @property
    def first(self) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.first)

    @property
    def last(self) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.last)

    def nth(self, index: int) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.nth(index))

    def locator(self, selector: Selector) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.locator(selector))

    def and_(self, other: Locator) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.and_(other.implementation))

    def or_(self, other: Locator) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.or_(other.implementation))

    def filter(
        self,
        *,
        has: Locator | None = None,
        has_not: Locator | None = None,
        has_text: TextValue | None = None,
        has_not_text: TextValue | None = None,
    ) -> Locator:
        return Locator(
            self.implementation.filter(
                has=None if has is None else has.implementation,
                has_not=None if has_not is None else has_not.implementation,
                has_text=has_text,
                has_not_text=has_not_text,
            )
        )

    async def tap(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.tap(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def double_tap(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.double_tap(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def long_press(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.long_press(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def fill(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.fill(value, force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def clear(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.clear(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def press(
        self,
        key: str,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.press(key, force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def check(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.check(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def uncheck(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.uncheck(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout)

    async def swipe(
        self,
        direction: Direction,
        *,
        percent: float = 0.75,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.swipe(
            direction,
            percent=percent,
            force=force,
            trial=trial,
            timeout=timeout,
        )

    async def scroll(
        self,
        direction: Direction,
        *,
        percent: float = 0.75,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.scroll(
            direction,
            percent=percent,
            force=force,
            trial=trial,
            timeout=timeout,
        )

    async def drag_to(
        self,
        target: Locator,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.drag_to(
            target.implementation,
            force=force,
            trial=trial,
            timeout=timeout,
        )

    async def screenshot(
        self,
        path: Path | None = None,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> Screenshot:
        return await self.implementation.screenshot(path, timeout=timeout)

    async def wait_for(
        self,
        state: WaitState = WaitState.VISIBLE,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.wait_for(state, timeout=timeout)

    async def all(self) -> tuple[Locator, ...]:
        implementations = await self.implementation.all()
        return tuple(Locator(implementation) for implementation in implementations)

    async def element_infos(self) -> tuple[ElementSnapshot, ...]:
        return await self.implementation.element_infos()

    async def count(self) -> int:
        return await self.implementation.count()

    async def element_info(self) -> ElementSnapshot:
        return await self.implementation.element_info()

    async def is_visible(self) -> bool:
        return await self.implementation.is_visible()

    async def is_enabled(self) -> bool:
        return await self.implementation.is_enabled()

    async def is_checked(self) -> bool:
        return await self.implementation.is_checked()

    async def text_content(self) -> str:
        return await self.implementation.text_content()

    async def accessible_name(self) -> str:
        return await self.implementation.accessible_name()

    async def bounds(self) -> Rect:
        return await self.implementation.bounds()


class LocatorRoot:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncApp | AsyncScreen) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    def locator(self, selector: Selector) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.locator(selector))

    def get_by_text(self, value: TextValue, *, exact: bool = True) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_text(value, exact=exact))

    def get_by_label(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_label(value))

    def get_by_placeholder(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_placeholder(value))

    def get_by_test_id(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_test_id(value))

    def get_by_resource_id(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_resource_id(value))

    def get_by_content_description(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_content_description(value))

    def get_by_role(
        self,
        role: Role,
        *,
        name: TextValue | None = None,
        exact: bool = True,
    ) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_role(role, name=name, exact=exact))


class App(LocatorRoot):
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncApp) -> None:
        super().__init__(implementation)
        self.app_implementation = implementation

    @property
    def package_name(self) -> str:
        return self.app_implementation.package_name

    async def activate(self) -> None:
        await self.app_implementation.activate()

    async def terminate(self) -> None:
        await self.app_implementation.terminate()

    async def clear_data(self) -> None:
        await self.app_implementation.clear_data()

    async def reset(self) -> None:
        await self.app_implementation.reset()

    async def screenshot(self, path: Path | None = None) -> Screenshot:
        return await self.app_implementation.screenshot(path)

    async def close(self) -> None:
        await self.app_implementation.close()


class Screen(LocatorRoot):
    pass


class Keyboard:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncKeyboard) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    async def press(self, key: Key, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.press(key, timeout=timeout)


class Touchscreen:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncTouchscreen) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    async def tap(self, point: Point, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.tap(point, timeout=timeout)


class Device:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncDevice) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.screen = Screen(implementation.screen)
        self.keyboard = Keyboard(implementation.keyboard)
        self.touchscreen = Touchscreen(implementation.touchscreen)
        self.tracing: TraceRecorder = implementation.tracing

    async def launch_app(
        self,
        application: ApplicationOptions | None = None,
        *,
        package: str | None = None,
        app_path: Path | None = None,
        clear_data: bool = False,
    ) -> App:
        implementation = await self.implementation.launch_app(
            application,
            package=package,
            app_path=app_path,
            clear_data=clear_data,
        )
        return App(implementation)

    async def screenshot(self, path: Path | None = None) -> Screenshot:
        return await self.implementation.screenshot(path)

    async def hierarchy(self) -> HierarchySource:
        return await self.implementation.hierarchy()

    async def server_logs(self) -> tuple[ServerLogRecord, ...]:
        return await self.implementation.server_logs()

    async def install_app(
        self,
        path: Path,
        *,
        replace: bool = True,
        grant_permissions: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> OperationResult:
        return await self.implementation.install_app(
            path,
            replace=replace,
            grant_permissions=grant_permissions,
            timeout=timeout,
        )

    async def uninstall_app(
        self,
        package: str,
        *,
        keep_data: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> OperationResult:
        return await self.implementation.uninstall_app(
            package,
            keep_data=keep_data,
            timeout=timeout,
        )

    async def close(self) -> None:
        await self.implementation.close()


class Android:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncAndroid) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    async def devices(self) -> tuple[DeviceInfo, ...]:
        return await self.implementation.devices()

    async def connect(
        self,
        options: AndroidConnectionOptions | None = None,
        *,
        serial: str | None = None,
        server: AppiumServer | None = None,
        timeouts: AppiumTimeouts | None = None,
        capabilities: tuple[AdditionalCapability, ...] = (),
    ) -> Device:
        implementation = await self.implementation.connect(
            options,
            serial=serial,
            server=server,
            timeouts=timeouts,
            capabilities=capabilities,
        )
        return Device(implementation)

    async def close(self) -> None:
        await self.implementation.close()


class Appwright:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncAppwright) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.android = Android(implementation.android)

    async def close(self) -> None:
        await self.implementation.close()


class LocatorAssertions:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncLocatorAssertions) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation

    @property
    def not_(self) -> LocatorAssertions:
        return LocatorAssertions(self.implementation.not_)

    async def to_be_visible(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_visible(timeout=timeout)

    async def not_to_be_visible(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.not_to_be_visible(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_hidden(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_hidden(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_enabled(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_enabled(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_disabled(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_disabled(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_editable(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_editable(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_checked(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_checked(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_unchecked(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_unchecked(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_focused(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_focused(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_be_selected(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_be_selected(timeout=timeout)

    async def to_have_text(self, value: str, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_have_text(value, timeout=timeout)

    async def to_contain_text(self, value: str, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_contain_text(value, timeout=timeout)

    async def to_have_accessible_name(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_have_accessible_name(value, timeout=timeout)

    async def to_have_resource_id(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_have_resource_id(value, timeout=timeout)

    async def to_have_count(self, value: int, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        await self.implementation.to_have_count(value, timeout=timeout)


class AppwrightContextManager:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.context: AsyncAppwrightContextManager = core_async_appwright()
        self.appwright: Appwright | None = None

    async def __aenter__(self) -> Appwright:
        implementation = await self.context.__aenter__()
        self.appwright = Appwright(implementation)
        return self.appwright

    async def __aexit__(
        self,
        exception_type: type[BaseException] | None,
        exception: BaseException | None,
        traceback: object | None,
    ) -> None:
        await self.context.__aexit__(exception_type, exception, traceback)


def async_appwright() -> AppwrightContextManager:
    return AppwrightContextManager()


def expect(locator: Locator) -> LocatorAssertions:
    return LocatorAssertions(AsyncLocatorAssertions(locator.implementation))
